about.title: About us
paragraphs: La Tabasqueña Bakery is a Mexican bakery at 2901 Flores Rd, Mission, TX 78574. We offer a wide variety of delicious, high-quality baked goods.
Our bread is soft and flavorful—many customers taste the butter in every bite. With a 5 out of 5 rating from happy guests, we work every day to keep that standard.
For lots of regulars we’re already the go-to spot: the bread stays soft for days and the flavor keeps people coming back—and telling friends and family.
Beyond daily bread, we take custom cake orders: from simple butter cakes to filled styles or tres leches. Please order at least 2 days in advance.
If you want a nearby bakery with real-deal baked goods, La Tabasqueña Bakery is it. Call (956) 599-9221, WhatsApp us, or visit the shop.
about.customCakes: Custom cake? Order at least 2 days ahead:
